## New check / lens / change

**id:**

**What it catches (one line):**

**Seen in a real codebase?** (yes/no — it's why this exists)

### Checklist
- [ ] One check per PR
- [ ] All sections filled in
- [ ] `How to detect` is precise enough that two people would flag the same lines
- [ ] Severity ranked by likely damage, not category alarm
- [ ] Credential checks record the *type*, never the secret value
- [ ] No real app names, file paths, or live findings anywhere in the contribution
